title.en: After reaching 300 scales, Ye Tian's immeasurab...

content.en:
After breaking through to become an immeasurable lifeform, Ye Tian began to use those gray crystals to continue refining the immeasurable will.

Since he had broken free from the shackles of the realm, it was easier for his immeasurable will to be raised.

Originally, as soon as he broke through, his immeasurable will had been raised to the level of more than 230 scales.

Now using the gray crystal to refine the immeasurable will, the immeasurable will has been raised to 250 scales in a short period of time, and it is still improving rapidly.

280 scales!

300 scales!

After reaching 300 scales, Ye Tian's immeasurable will increase slowed down.

In the end, Ye Tian raised the immeasurable will to 350 scales, and he no longer used the gray crystal to refine the immeasurable will, so it was a little cost-effective to use this gray crystal to improve the immeasurable will.

"Test your attack power!"

Ye Tian took out an immeasurable wall and attacked with all his might.

Rumble!!!!

The Infinite Mystery Wall was directly penetrated by Ye Tian's Endless Golden Spear, and the entire Infinite Mystery Wall was cracked, but in the end, it was not destroyed, but was slowly recovering.

And at this time, the immeasurable Xuanbi still revealed a number.

“23809！"

Seeing this number, Ye Tian was very happy.

You must know that the weaker mid-level immeasurable lifeform only has an attack power of six or seven hundred immeasurable scales, and he has reached more than twenty thousand immeasurable scales.

It can be said that with his current strength, he is enough to instantly kill a group of ordinary middle-level immeasurable lifeforms.

"My current strength can be called invincible among mid-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, he now has an immeasurable scale of 350, and he has also comprehended the Infinite Extreme Dao, and has cultivated the superior Immeasurable Body Infinite Body, and has also cultivated the Infinite Body to the realm of Xiaocheng.

Moreover, he was promoted perfectly.

With such a superposition, how can other mid-level immeasurable lifeforms compare to him?

Subsequently, Ye Tian went out of the customs.

"Congratulations to the Endless Dao Ancestor for breaking through to a mid-level immeasurable lifeform!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Dao Ancestor for breaking through to a mid-level immeasurable lifeform!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Dao Ancestor for breaking through to a mid-level immeasurable lifeform!"

A Supreme Ninefold Ancestor congratulated.

Not long after, Ye Tian held a feast to congratulate himself on his breakthrough to a mid-level immeasurable lifeform.

In the past, he was only invincible in the Silent Black Sea, but now he is also the highest.

Although the Silent Black Sea now has one or two middle-level immeasurable lifeforms, from the perspective of cultivation, they are not as good as Ye Tian, and their combat power is even less worth mentioning.

After Ye Tianxiu made a breakthrough, he also copied all of his copy bodies into mid-level immeasurable life forms.

Even the copy body of the Xuan Ming Great Ancestor took time to break through to the mid-level immeasurable life form, and it was a perfect breakthrough, but the foundation was not as good as the main body.

......

True mountain collar.

When the Xuanming Great Ancestor broke through to the mid-level immeasurable life form, many Great Ancestors in the entire True Mountain Territory were stunned.

"Xuan Ming Great Ancestor has broken through to a mid-level immeasurable life form, how is this possible, how long has he only been a Great Ancestor?"

"Yes, it hasn't been long since the Great Ancestor of Xuan Ming broke through to a primary-level immeasurable lifeform, even if he is continuously provided with resources, he can't break through to a middle-level immeasurable lifeform so quickly, it's incredible!"

"Who is the Xuanming Great Ancestor, I haven't been in retreat for a long time, and in the first year of hundreds of thousands of realms, how can there be an additional middle-level immeasurable lifeform?"

"Xuanming Great Ancestor must have a great opportunity, otherwise he wouldn't have broken through to the realm of middle-level immeasurable life forms so quickly!"

"Knowing the fate of the Xuanming Great Ancestor, now they are middle-level immeasurable lifeforms, and their strength is much stronger than ours!"

True mountain collar, the ancient city of martial arts.

When Jiang Jun Great Ancestor learned that Ye Tian had broken through and had become a mid-level immeasurable life form, he was immediately shocked.

Previously, Ye Tian had also traded with him for the Misty Water Stone Cultivation Infinite Body, which was a superior immeasurable body, but now he had broken through to a mid-level immeasurable life form.

"Did the Xuanming Great Ancestor successfully cultivate the Infinite Body, or did he give up cultivating the Infinite Body and break through to the realm of the Intermediate Infinite Life Body?"

Jiang Jun Ancestor thought very suspiciously.

But no matter what the case is, Ye Tian is too demonic!

this day.

Ye Tian received an invitation from the True Mountain Leader Golden Glass Great Ancestor and went to the True Mountain Leader's True Martial Giant City to discuss.

Regarding the invitation of the Golden Glass Ancestor, Ye Tian naturally did not refuse, and went directly to the meeting.

True Martial Giant City.

When Ye Tian came to his destination, he sensed the breath of a mid-level immeasurable life form.

"So many mid-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

Obviously, this meeting is not simple, and it is definitely not just for him!

Soon, the meeting was almost all there.

This time, there were thirteen middle-level immeasurable lifeforms attending the meeting, and there was not a single primary-level immeasurable lifeform.

The entire True Mountain Territory originally had eighteen middle-level immeasurable lifeforms, and now with Ye Tian, there were also nineteen, excluding the middle-level immeasurable lifeforms who had not been able to go out of retreat for a long time, it was already very good to be able to come to thirteen.

And the person presiding over the meeting was the Golden Glass Great Ancestor, this was a top-notch middle-level immeasurable life form, and it was also a high-grade immeasurable body of cultivation, and his strength was very good.

"Ladies and gentlemen, I am glad that you are here for this meeting. Maybe some Great Ancestors know what this meeting is, but the newly promoted mid-level immeasurable life form Xuan Ying Great Ancestor shouldn't be very clear, so I'll briefly introduce the situation!"

Jinli Ancestor said.

Ye Tian didn't speak, but listened with his ears up.

At this time, the Golden Glass Ancestor waved his hand, and a map appeared.

"This is the location of our real mountain territory, and this is the location of some of the surrounding territories. There are probably hundreds of territories in this area, and these hundreds of territories are called hopeless lands. The Hopeless Land was cut off, and it was impossible to travel to other areas of the Genki Territory, and there were only some special ways to leave. "

When the Golden Glass Ancestor said this, Ye Tian was shocked.

He also thought that all the territories in the Xuanqi Territory could be interconnected, but he didn't expect this place to be isolated.

The Golden Glass Ancestor continued, "Everyone should know very well that it is difficult for us to become a high-level immeasurable lifeform in a hopeless land. The known high-level immeasurable lifeforms are all smuggled in from other realms in the Genki Realm, and most of them hide in our hopeless places to avoid enemies or for some special reason. However, our native ancestors in the hopeless land had no way to continue to break through, so they could only leave the hopeless land. And the time to leave next time is almost up, but this time there is a little change, maybe the number of places will be reduced!"

"What, the slot cut?"

When the other Great Ancestors heard this, their expressions suddenly changed.
